title: astrebla pectinata
intro: Astrebla pectinata, also known as blue grass or blue grass grass, is a perennial grass species native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Astrebla pectinata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Astrebla pectinata can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used in traditional Australian medicine.
